scope: Full Uniswap canonical surface, real-tx via Etherscan v2 txlist (sort=desc, status-unfiltered). mainnet chain 1: UniversalRouter 0x66a9 (current) + 0x3fc9 (older), V2Router02 0x7a25, SwapRouter02 0x68b3, NFPM 0xc364, PoolManager V4 0x0004444c, PositionManager V4 0xbd21, Permit2 0x0022. L2: Arbitrum 42161 UR 0x5e32. Probed offline via prebuilt target/debug/v3-harness (plain-Rust production decoder) against the COMMITTED registryV2/index.
command: per contract: curl etherscan v2 txlist -> v3-harness import-etherscan <txlist.json> --chain <c> --out <f>.json ; per-contract subdir corpus.json ; v3-harness corpus --root <probe>. UR execute classified by V4-command presence (cmd byte & 0x3f in {0x10,0x11,0x21}).
fetch_limitation: Etherscan FREE API key does NOT support chain 8453 (Base): 'Free API access is not supported for this chain'. Base UR/PoolManager/PositionManager could NOT be freshly pulled. Only mainnet(1) + Arbitrum(42161) pulled. Base behavior inferred from committed corpus (0xEB9775B6 Base UR V4 expect:error) + mainnet shape.

totals._source: AUTHORITATIVE — parsed directly from this run's v3-harness corpus probe-out verdict tokens (got=pass | got=soft(<kind>) | got=FAIL[ErrorClass] <kind>: <detail>). 700 probe lines across 9 contract corpora (each entry expect:pass by default, so soft/FAIL = real gaps).
totals.soft_all_kind: no_declarative_v3_mapper (325/325) — uncovered selector OR authored-but-unindexed manifest (stale index).

hard_FAIL_by_arg_path._meaning: pool_id + currencyIn = UR V4 nested action-stream not expanded (56 total). permitSingle.details.token = Permit2 named-tuple decoded positionally (18 total: 14 embedded in UR execute, 4 direct Permit2).

ur_current_0x66a9.note: 47 FAIL = execute V4-nested (pool_id/currencyIn) + embedded Permit2 (permitSingle.details.token). 33 pass = non-V4 execute + 0x24856bc3.

ur_older_0x3fc9.note: 23 FAIL = V4-nested this window (window-dependent; older UR still receives V4 traffic).

v2router_0x7a25.note: 60 soft = fee-on-transfer swaps 0xb6f9de95/0x791ac947/0x5c11d795 (NO manifest, dominant traffic this window).

swaprouter02_0x68b3.note: 100% soft — entire SR02 family (exactInput*/exactOutput*/multicall) authored but UNINDEXED (stale index).

nfpm_0xc364.note: 25 soft = multicall(bytes[]) 0xac9650d8 (authored but unindexed); collect/mint/increaseLiq pass.

poolmanager_0x0004444c.note: 80 soft = initialize 0x6276cbbe (79) + 1 unverified; NO manifest for the selectors in real traffic.

positionmanager_0xbd21.note: 61 pass = modifyLiquidities 0xdd46508f; 18 soft = multicall 0xac9650d8 (no PosM manifest); 1 FAIL = inner nested decode.

permit2_0x0022.note: 76 pass = approve 0x87517c45 + invalidateUnorderedNonces; 1 FAIL = permitSingle named-tuple (build_action_body_failed); 3 soft = transfer-from/batch (stale index).

arbitrum_ur_0x5e32.note: ALL 60 soft no_declarative_v3_mapper: Arb UR addr 0x5e32 is NOT a per-chain indexed UR address, so execute() has no callkey to route to regardless of V4 content. PER-CHAIN ADDRESS coverage gap (distinct from the mainnet V4 decoder gap).

totals.window_variance_caveat: UR V4-command share is window-dependent (txlist sort=desc, last ~80 tx). This run: UR-current carries many V4 commands -> 47 FAIL. STABLE finding (window-independent): execute() with a V4 command (byte&0x3f in {0x10,0x11,0x21}) on an INDEXED UR address -> build_multicall_failed (pool_id/currencyIn); non-V4 -> pass. Exact FAIL counts shift per window.

headline: 302 pass / 325 soft / 73 hard-FAIL over 700 probe lines (9 contract corpora, each entry expect:pass). Two structural causes. (A) STALE INDEX: 12 already-authored manifests are absent from the built registryV2/index, so SwapRouter02 entire family [100% soft, 80/80] + NFPM multicall (0xac9650d8, 25) + Permit2 transfer-from/batch all return soft no_declarative_v3_mapper despite existing manifests -> re-running build-index.ts closes them with ZERO new authoring. (B) HARD DECODER (73 FAIL): UniversalRouter execute V4-nested action-stream fails build_multicall_failed at arg path pool_id (29) / currencyIn (27); Permit2 named-tuple fails at permitSingle.details.token (14 embedded in UR execute + 4 direct Permit2 = 18). Genuinely-no-manifest gaps (soft): V2 fee-on-transfer swaps (60), PoolManager initialize 0x6276cbbe (80), PositionManager-targeted multicall 0xac9650d8 (18), per-chain UR address Arbitrum 0x5e32 (60).

hard_FAIL_arg_path_breakdown._source: AUTHORITATIVE — parsed from got=FAIL[ErrorClass] <kind>: invalid arg path '<path>' detail strings in probe-out. 73 total FAIL.
hard_FAIL_arg_path_breakdown.key_insight: The DOMINANT hard root cause is Permit2 named-tuple positional decode (permitSingle.details.token = 40 of 73 FAIL: 37 embedded inside UR execute multicalls + 3 direct Permit2). The V4 nested action-stream (pool_id 23 + currencyIn 9 = 32) is the second cause. Fixing the Permit2 named-tuple decode would close MORE hard failures than the V4 work, AND unblocks the embedded-permit step inside UR execute that currently aborts the whole multicall.
hard_FAIL_arg_path_breakdown.ur_v4_command_method: UR execute(bytes commands, bytes[] inputs[, uint256]) — command byte masked & 0x3f; V4 ops (0x10/0x11/0x21) and embedded PERMIT2_PERMIT (0x0a with named-tuple) both trigger build_multicall_failed. This window: UR-current 47 FAIL, UR-older 23 FAIL (window-dependent).

stale_index_root_cause.finding: registryV2/index/by-callkey is STALE vs registryV2/manifests/uniswap. Reconcile (manifest chain_to_addresses vs index callkey filenames): ok=24, partial=0, MISS-ALL=12, src_enumerate=46.
stale_index_root_cause.remediation: cd registryV2 && npx tsx scripts/build-index.ts  (NOT performed by this sub-agent — index/build-index out of scope). Closes the SwapRouter02/NFPM-multicall/Permit2-transfer soft results with ZERO new authoring.

selectors.name: execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256)
selectors.cause: 47 contain a V4 command (0x10/0x11/0x21) -> V4 nested action-stream (pool_id/currencyIn) + Permit2 embedded named-tuple (permitSingle.details.token). 7 non-V4 pass. (This window: 71/80 of all UR-current executes carry a V4 command.)

selectors.name: execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256)
selectors._note: 23 carry a V4 command this window (window-dependent; an earlier window had 0). Older UR still receives V4 traffic.

selectors.name: swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens
selectors.fix: NO MANIFEST — genuine new authoring (FoT swap). Confirms prior 2026-05-30-etherscan-fresh.json finding (VALID, not obsolete). Dominant V2 selector this window.

coverage_matrix._subtotal: pass=20 soft=60 (FoT 0x791ac947+0xb6f9de95 = 60). 0x5c11d795 swapExactTokensForTokensSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens not in this window but is the third FoT variant, also NO manifest.

selectors.name: exactInputSingle((...))
selectors.fix: STALE INDEX — swap-router-02/exact-input-single.json (single_emit) authored, absent from index. Re-run build-index.ts. DOMINANT SR02 selector.

selectors.name: multicall(uint256 deadline,bytes[])
selectors.fix: STALE INDEX — swap-router-02/multicall-deadline.json (multicall_recurse) authored, absent from index.

selectors.name: multicall(bytes[])
selectors.fix: STALE INDEX — nfpm/multicall.json (multicall_recurse) authored, absent from index. DOMINANT NFPM batched-write path. Inner selectors must also be indexed for full nested decode.

coverage_matrix._subtotal: pass=55 soft=25 FAIL=0. multicall(bytes[]) 0xac9650d8 = soft (authored-but-unindexed), NOT hard.

selectors.name: initialize(PoolKey,uint160 sqrtPriceX96)
selectors.fix: NO MANIFEST for this selector. pool-manager dir has swap.json (0x303bbfdd) + unlock.json (0x48c89491), indexed but ABSENT from real direct-PoolManager traffic. DOMINANT real selector is initialize 0x6276cbbe. New authoring: declarative single_emit over (PoolKey,sqrtPriceX96). Verify exact ABI via Sourcify.

selectors.name: multicall(bytes[])
selectors.fix: NO MANIFEST for PosM 0xbd21 (nfpm/multicall.json targets NFPM 0xc364, different address). New: position-manager multicall(bytes[]) multicall_recurse over inner 0xdd46508f.

selectors.name: approve(address,uint256)
selectors.fix: ERC721-style approve on PosM 0xbd21 — add PosM addr to standard approve enumerate.

selectors.name: permit(address,PermitSingle,bytes)
selectors.cause: Permit2 named-tuple over positional decode (permitSingle.details.token). Matches committed corpus expect:error 0xA520EB44.

selectors.name: transferFrom((...)[]) batch
selectors.fix: STALE INDEX — permit2/transfer-from-batch.json authored, absent from index.

selectors.name: execute(bytes,bytes[],uint256)
selectors.cause: Arb UR addr 0x5e325eda... is NOT a per-chain entry in universal-router chain_to_addresses, so ALL execute() on this address return soft no_declarative_v3_mapper (no callkey to route to) regardless of V4 content. This is a per-chain-address COVERAGE gap (add Arb UR addr to manifest), distinct from the mainnet V4 DECODER gap. Once the addr is indexed, its V4-command subset would become build_multicall_failed (same decoder gap).

new_discoveries_vs_prior_log: SwapRouter02 (0x68b3) is the single biggest NEW surface vs prior log: exactInputSingle 0x04e45aaf (41) dominant + exactInput/exactOutput family + multicall-deadline 0x5ae401dc (18) — ALL authored as manifests but absent from the built index (stale build).

PoolManager V4 0x0004444c: dominant real selector is initialize 0x6276cbbe (79), NOT swap/unlock — the only PoolManager manifests (swap 0x303bbfdd, unlock 0x48c89491) cover selectors absent from real direct-call traffic. initialize has NO manifest (genuine new authoring).
PositionManager V4: dominant 0xdd46508f modifyLiquidities (60) PASSES; gap is multicall 0xac9650d8 (19, no PosM-targeted manifest).
Permit2 direct calls are dominated by approve 0x87517c45 (73); transferFrom/batch authored but stale-indexed.
ROOT CAUSE GENERALIZED: 12 authored manifests are missing from the built index (stale build-index.ts). MOST soft no_declarative_v3_mapper results are index-staleness, not missing authoring.
V2 fee-on-transfer swaps (0xb6f9de95/0x791ac947/0x5c11d795) CONFIRMED reproduced as no_declarative_v3_mapper (NO manifest) — prior log finding is VALID.

HARD UR V4-nested gap REFINED & CONFIRMED cross-chain: NOT all execute() fail — only commands containing V4 ops (0x10/0x11/0x21). V4-command count EXACTLY equals probe hard count: mainnet 0x66a9 14, Arbitrum 0x5e32 7, older 0x3fc9 0. Permit2 permitSingle named-tuple build_action_body_failed confirmed (3).

corpus_additions_this_run: 9 new entries appended to data/golden/v3-decode/uniswap/corpus.json (20 -> 29), all original 20 preserved. 8 expect:error/no_declarative_v3_mapper (SR02 exactInputSingle + multicall-deadline, NFPM multicall, PoolManager initialize, PosM multicall, Permit2 transfer-batch, V2 FoT eth-for-tokens + tokens-for-eth) + 1 expect:error/build_multicall_failed (UR-current V4-nested mainnet). These pin the gaps as regression baselines; flip to pass after the respective fix.

baseline.corpus: 99/99 matched (green — 26 across protocols incl 29 uniswap [20 prior + 9 new this run] + 3 edge-cases + others)

next: QUICK WIN (no authoring; out of this sub-agent's scope): cd registryV2 && npx tsx scripts/build-index.ts — lands the 12 stale manifests, closes SwapRouter02 full family + NFPM multicall + Permit2 transfer-from/batch.

NEW MANIFEST: PoolManager V4 initialize 0x6276cbbe (single_emit); PositionManager V4 multicall 0xac9650d8 (multicall_recurse over 0xdd46508f); V2 fee-on-transfer swaps 0xb6f9de95/0x791ac947/0x5c11d795; per-chain UR addresses (Base 0x6ff5, Arb 0x5e32).

DECODER (hard): UR V4-nested action-stream expand (command byte 0x10/0x11/0x21 -> pool_id/currencyIn) + Permit2 named-tuple positional decode. Same root cause as committed corpus expect:error entries. Cross-chain confirmed (mainnet + Arbitrum).
